Main / Version1AccessorsSpecification I suggest we use this page to flesh out the design of better accessors and hosts. Accessor specifications are organized according to three levels described in the Accessors white paper (Interface, Component, and

Accessors white paper (Interface, Component, and Composition). This page describes (or will describe) version 0 (the very first attempt) at a design for accessors. Interface Add a "requires" tag something like <requires name="org.terraswarm.mqtt"/>

thing like <requires name="org.terraswarm.mqtt"/> FIXME Component JavaScript context functions The following functions we propose keeping as-is from version 0: alert(string): pop up a dialog with the specified message. clearTimeout(int): clear a time

specified message. clearTimeout(int): clear a timeout with the specified handle. get(port, n): get an input from a port on channel n (return null if there is no input). print(string): print the specified string to the console (standard out). send(val

ied string to the console (standard out). send(value, port, n): send a value to an output port on channel n. setTimeout(function, int): set the function to execute after specified time and return handle. The following functions are new: FIXME The fol

le. The following functions are new: FIXME The following objects provide bundles of functions. The need for these is specified in an accessor using the "requires" tag defined above. http mqtt obd serial etc. Deprecated Functions The following functio

al etc. Deprecated Functions The following functions provide compatibility with version 0 (Possibly): error(string): throw an exception with the specified message. Replace with ordinary JavaScript throw. httpRequest(url, method, properties, body, tim

ow. httpRequest(url, method, properties, body, timeout): HTTP request (GET, POST, PUT, etc.) readURL(string): read the specified URL and return its contents as a string (HTTP GET). valueOf(parameter): retrieve the value of a parameter. Composition FI
